name: USS John A. Bole (DD 755)
events: 24 Apr 1945 Following shakedown in the Caribbean USS John A. Bole returns to New York.
15 May 1945 USS John A. Bole departed from Boston bound for the Pacific.
7 Jun 1945 USS John A. Bole arrived at Pearl Harbor.
21 Jun 1945 USS John A. Bole arrived at Eniwetok.
29 Jun 1945 USS John A. Bole arrived in the Okinawa area where she served for the remainder of the war.
